ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was submitted */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary author */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the paper (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "final_decision" TEXT /* Final decision made by the conference organizers */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the final decision was made */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author belongs to */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_authors" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author (e.g., primary author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the reviewer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the reviewer belongs to */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the reviewer for assignments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflict_types" (
  "conflict_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict type */,
  "conflict_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the conflict type (e.g., Institutional, Financial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflicts_of_interest" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict of interest */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "conflict_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict of interest */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper associated with the conflict */,
  "declared_date" TEXT /* Date when the conflict of interest was declared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_of_interest_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_of_interest_conflict_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_type_id") REFERENCES conflict_types ("conflict_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_of_interest_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_reviewers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the reviewer was assigned to the paper */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review assignment (e.g., pending, completed, rejected) */,
  "review_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "rebuttal" TEXT /* Rebuttal provided by the author */,
  "rebuttal_date" TEXT /* Date when the rebuttal was submitted */,
  "final_rating" INTEGER /* Final rating after considering the rebuttal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, reviewer, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_authors" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviewers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
